rows.label: qev014304_MSG0001
rows.name:
I heard from the informant Chacha
that Alex is trying to massacre
the Aliens in this city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0002
rows.name:
That Nopon must definitely
know Alex's whereabouts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please, head to West Moby Street
and listen to what he has to say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hurry and go take down
Alex as soon as possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0005
rows.name:
Neither Eliza-san nor I like
violence. But I can't bear to
see any more Aliens killed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0006
rows.name:
By stopping Alex's plan, we
can begin walking towards
equality and freedom once again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0007
rows.name:
Welcome back! It seems you
managed to stop Alex's plan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0008
rows.name:
Eliza-san has been eagerly
awaiting your report.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014304_MSG0009
rows.name:
Please, hurry and tell her the
details of what happened![ST:wait ]
